greeting:
🎁 14 days of VPN for FREE! Connect right now! 🌐 Servers:
🇱🇻 Latvia 🇩🇪 Germany 🇸🇪 Sweden 🇷🇺 Russia
🚀 Fast speed unlimited traffic 💪 No ads ♾️ Bypassing WS 🔗 Invite a friend and get bonus subscription days (“🤝 Referrals”)
pricing_info_trial: 💰 VPN subscription plans • 1 mo — 150₽ • 3 mo — 400₽ (save 50₽) • 6 mo — 750₽ (save 150₽) • 12 mo — 1320₽ (save 480₽) Trial does not renew automatically Payment methods: 💸 Bank card ⭐ Telegram Stars
pricing_info_paid: 💰 VPN subscription plans • 1 mo — 150₽ • 3 mo — 400₽ (save 50₽) • 6 mo — 750₽ (save 150₽) • 12 mo — 1320₽ (save 480₽) Payment methods: 💸 Bank card ⭐ Telegram Stars
pricing_info_paid_extra: 💰 VPN subscription plans • 1 mo — 150₽ • 3 mo — 400₽ (save 50₽) • 6 mo — 750₽ (save 150₽) • 12 mo — 1320₽ (save 480₽) Subscription + extra devices Single combined invoice Payment methods: 💸 Bank card ⭐ Telegram Stars
buy_screen_pending_discount_note: 🔥 %d%% off will be applied from your active promo code.
buy_tariff_pick_title: Choose a tariff to pay for:
no_subscription: ❌ You don't have an active subscription
tariff_downgrade_early_warning: ⚠️ Switching to a cheaper plan Good to know: 1. No refunds. We don’t return the price difference between the higher and lower plan to your card. 2. You’ll get more days. We take the remaining value of your higher plan and convert it into extra days at the cheaper plan’s daily rate. 3. Limits change right away. After you pay, traffic and device limits match the cheaper plan you chose. By tapping the button below, you accept these terms.
tariff_upgrade_notice: 📈 Tariff upgrade: you pay the full price of the selected period; remaining days on your old plan are converted into days on the new plan (see text above).
payment_tariff_notice_upgrade_stars: 📈 Tariff upgrade: full period price in Stars; remaining days on the old plan convert to days on the new plan.
tariff_upgrade_sell_notice: 📈 Switching to a more expensive plan How it works: You simply pay the new plan in full (see the amount below). The days you still have left on your old (cheaper) plan don’t vanish — we turn them into extra days on the new plan. Your example: • You’re buying %d days • Your old balance becomes +%d bonus days • Total: after payment you’ll have about %d days of subscription
tariff_downgrade_sell_notice: 📉 Switching to a cheaper plan How it works: You pay the new plan in full (see the amount below). Time left on your higher plan isn’t lost — at the cheaper plan’s daily rate it becomes extra days. Your example: • You’re buying %d days on the new plan • +%d days are added from your higher-plan balance • Total: after payment you’ll have about %d days of subscription
payment_tariff_checkout_bonus_upgrade_li: 🔄 Switch bonus: +%d d. from your old plan
vpn_pending_discount_no_deadline: ⏳ No time deadline (limited only by the number of discounted payments)
vpn_subscription_link_hint: 📱 Copy the link and add it to your VPN app
subscription_expiring: ⚠️ Subscription reminder ⚠️ Your subscription expires on %s Please renew to keep access

hwid_extra_disabled: ⚠️ Purchasing extra devices is disabled. Existing paid slots stay active until they expire. You can still renew your subscription without extra devices.

no_devices: You have no connected devices yet
device_delete_info:
If your device limit is full, remove an old device to connect a new one.

⚠️ Note: removing from the list does not uninstall the app. The system simply “forgets” the device, and VPN will stop working on it until you connect it again.

Example: limit is 3 devices, all taken → remove the old phone → connect the new one.
admin_stats_users_body: Overview: • Registered: %d • Active subscription: %d (%s%%)%s New registrations: • Today: %d • Last 7 days: %d • This calendar month: %d Activity: • Share with active subscription: %s%% • Registration growth vs prev. month: %s%d (%s%%)
admin_stats_subs_body: Overview: • Total subscription states: %d (trial + active + inactive) • VPN active now: %d (paid: %d, trial: %d) Conversion (among active VPN): • Paid share: %s%% Subscription sales: • Today: %d • Last 7 days: %d • This month: %d%s
admin_stats_ref_body: Overview: • Unique referrers: %d • Active referrers (with a paying referee): %d • Total days credited to referrers: %d Days credited to referrers: • Today: %d • Last 7 days: %d • This month: %d Average per active referrer: %s days Top 10 referrers: %s
admin_stats_summary_body: Users: • Total: %d • Active subscription: %d • New this month: %d Subscriptions: • VPN active now: %d • Paid among them: %d • Paid share among active VPN: %s%% Finance (month, ₽ RUB): • Revenue: %s ₽ • ARPU: %s ₽ • Transactions: %d Growth: • Users: %s%d this month (%s%% vs prev. month) • Subscription sales: %s%d this month (%s%% vs prev. month)
admin_infra_api_error: ❌ Failed to fetch data from the panel API. Check Remnawave version and token permissions.
admin_infra_notify_hint: Sent once per day at 16:00 UTC (same schedule as subscription reminders). Uses calendar days until the node billing date. One message per threshold and node for a given billing date.
admin_infra_billing_cron_body: 🏗 Infrastructure billing Node payment in %d calendar day(s). • Node: %s • Provider: %s • Billing date: %s
admin_infra_nodes_pick_hint: Tap a node below. Add appears when the panel has free nodes.
admin_infra_node_create_pick_provider: Pick a provider for the new link:
admin_infra_wiz_node_date_prompt: Send the new billing date (same timezone as stats, currently Europe/Moscow): • 18.04.2026 12:00 • or date only: 18.04.2026 / 18.04.26 (today’s time of day is applied)
admin_infra_wiz_node_create_date_prompt: Send the next billing date for this provider+node: date and time, or date only (DD.MM.YYYY / DD.MM.YY) — today’s time of day is applied.
admin_infra_wiz_bad_date: ❌ Could not parse the date. Try DD.MM.YYYY, DD.MM.YY, or DD.MM.YYYY HH:MM.
admin_infra_hist_create_pick_provider: Pick a provider for a new history entry:
admin_infra_hist_actions_hint: To change an entry: delete it and add a new one.
admin_infra_wiz_hist_amount_prompt: Send the payment amount (number, comma or dot as decimal separator):
admin_infra_wiz_hist_date_prompt: Send the billed date (same formats as for nodes).
admin_infra_prov_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
admin_infra_wiz_prov_favicon_prompt: Send favicon URL (https…), or - to skip:
admin_infra_wiz_prov_login_prompt: Send customer-area URL, or - to skip:
admin_infra_wiz_prov_edit_icon_prompt: Send new favicon URL or - to clear (if the panel accepts null):
admin_infra_wiz_prov_edit_login_prompt: Send new login URL or - to clear:
broadcast_choose_audience: 📢 Choose who should receive the message:
broadcast_aud_active_paid: 💳 Paid (had at least one subscription payment)
broadcast_enter_message:
📢 Enter the broadcast message (%s):

You can send a photo or an image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP) — with or without a caption.
broadcast_pick_buttons: 📎 Choose buttons under the message (none, one, or several), then tap Next:
broadcast_session_expired: Broadcast session expired. Start again: /broadcast or Admin → Broadcast.
promo_enter_code: Send the promo code as a message (letters and digits).
promo_apply_failed: Could not apply the promo code.
promo_err_already_used: ❌ This promo code was already used
promo_err_not_found: ❌ This promo code does not exist
promo_err_inactive: ❌ This promo code is no longer active
promo_err_pending_discount: ❌ You already have an active discount. Use it before activating another.
promo_err_tariff_mismatch: ❌ This promo code is for a different tariff. Open Buy and check your current tariff.
promo_apply_ok_discount: 🎉 Promo activated! ⏰ %d%% off your next purchase
promo_apply_ok_trial_has_sub: 🎉 Promo activated! ℹ️ You already have an active subscription
promo_admin_root: 🎫 Promo codes 📊 Statistics: • Total codes: %d • Active: %d • Inactive: %d Choose an action:
promo_stat_body_v2: 📊 Stats for %s 📈 Summary: • Total uses: %d • Uses today: %d • Remaining uses: %s 📅 Recent uses: %s
promo_stats_all_body_v2: 📊 Overall promo statistics 📈 Main metrics: • Total codes: %d • Active: %d • Inactive: %d Open a specific code in the list for details.
promo_delete_confirm_v2: ⚠️ Confirm deletion Delete promo %s? 📊 Info: • Uses: %s • Status: %s 👤 For users: activation records for this code and any active discount tied to it will be removed. Completed payments stay, but the promo link on those purchases will be cleared. ⚠️ This cannot be undone! ID: %d
promo_edit_menu_line_tariff_all: • Tariff scope (bonus days): all active tariffs
promo_edit_menu_line_disc_pay_inf: • Discounted subscription payments per user: unlimited
promo_edit_prompt_valid: Enter how many days the code stays valid from today (0 = no expiry):
promo_edit_prompt_valid_v2: 📅 Change promo expiry Enter days until expiry (from now): • 0 = no expiry • positive number = duration in days Example: 30 (valid for 30 days) Promo ID: %d
promo_edit_prompt_max_v2: 📊 Change max number of uses Enter new limit: • 0 = unlimited • positive number = cap Example: 100 Promo ID: %d
promo_edit_prompt_sub_days_v2: 📅 Change subscription days Enter new number of days: Example: 30 Promo ID: %d
promo_edit_prompt_trial_days_v2: 🎁 Change trial length Enter new number of days: Example: 7 Promo ID: %d
promo_edit_prompt_disc_pay_v2: 💳 Discounted subscription payments per user Current: %s Enter an integer ≥ 1. Send 0 for unlimited payments until the discount window ends (not recommended; reverting requires DB edits). Promo ID: %d
promo_edit_tariff_scope_body: Choose all active tariffs or one specific tariff.
promo_wizard_code_body: Enter the promo code (letters and digits only):
promo_success_disc_first: ⏱ Discount until first payment after activation
promo_success_disc_time_unlimited: ⏱ No time limit on the discount (limited only by the number of discounted subscription payments)
promo_wizard_disc_sub_payments: How many subscription payments can each user complete with this discount? Enter an integer ≥ 1. Send 0 for unlimited payments until the discount window ends (not recommended; reverting requires DB edits).
promo_wizard_subdays_scope_body: Which tariffs does this bonus apply to?
promo_success_disc_pay_unlimited: 🔁 Discounted subscription payments: unlimited (until discount expires)
promo_card_disc_sub_pay_inf: 🔁 Discounted subscription payments per user: unlimited
promo_line_disc_pay_n_short: 🔁 Up to %d discounted subscription payments per user
promo_line_discount_multi_no_deadline: 💸 %d%% — no time limit (limited only by discounted subscription payments)
promo_card_discount_multi_no_deadline: 💸 %d%% — no time limit (payment count limit only)
promo_wizard_valid_days: Code validity in days (0 = no expiry):
promo_wizard_disc_hours: Discount validity in hours from the moment the user activates the promo. One-time: 0 = until the first subscription payment; 1–8760 = one countdown window. Multi-use: 0 = no time limit (limit is only the number of discounted subscription payments); 1–8760 = one countdown for the whole bundle.
admin_tariffs_title: 💎 Tariffs Total: %d • Active: %d Paid purchases with a tariff: %d Pick a tariff or create a new one:
tariff_wizard_traffic: Traffic limit in GB per reset period. 0 = unlimited in DB; subscription may use the config fallback.
tariff_wizard_tier: Tier 1–10 (product priority). List order on create equals tier.
tariff_wizard_stars: Telegram Stars for the same periods (four numbers). Or send - / auto to derive from RUB using RUB_PER_STAR (if set).
tariff_err_prices: Need exactly four non-negative numbers separated by commas.
tariff_err_stars_auto: Set RUB_PER_STAR in env or enter four numbers manually.
tariff_card_traffic_unlim: Traffic: unlimited in DB (0 — config fallback when issuing)
tariff_edit_prices_hint: Enter prices: RUB1,RUB2,RUB3,RUB4|STAR1,STAR2,STAR3,STAR4 or RUB1,RUB2,RUB3,RUB4|auto for Stars via RUB_PER_STAR.
tariff_delete_confirm: 🗑 Delete this tariff? Price rows will be removed. Purchases stay in history.
tariff_servers_title: Servers — %s Selected squads: %d / %d. Tap a row to toggle.
tariff_edit_prompt_name: Tariff name — %s Send the new name below:
tariff_edit_prompt_traffic: Traffic (GB) — tariff %s Enter the limit in GB. 0 = unlimited in DB; config fallback may apply when issuing.
tariff_edit_prompt_tier: Tier — tariff %s Enter a tier from 1 to 10.
tariff_edit_prompt_prices: Prices — tariff %s Enter one line: RUB1,RUB2,RUB3,RUB4|STAR1,STAR2,STAR3,STAR4 or ...|auto for auto Stars from RUB_PER_STAR.
tariff_edit_description_prompt: 📝 Edit description Current description: %s Send a new message with the same Telegram client formatting (or - to remove).
tariff_err_description_len: Description must be at most 1024 characters.
